title: Forms Engine Core Bounded Import Pilot
objective: Execute the first bounded import of the forms-engine core from the NETA-Forms source repo into the platform root using the approved engine-core scope only.
constrained_outputs: Initial bounded forms-engine import under c:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/packages/forms-engine
No wholesale repo import, no brand-asset tree import, no app-shell build-out, no database integration
validation_steps: Confirm the import scope is limited to the approved engine-core assets only
Confirm imported generators remain self-contained and do not pull in unresolved template, brand, or database surfaces
Confirm packages/forms-engine has a clear boundary and minimal run instructions
Confirm deferred forms-domain questions remain deferred and explicitly documented
sql_permission_note: This packet is a bounded code/content import pilot only. It does not authorize forms-domain schema or database work.
